items.name_en: Gucci Siena Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
Gucci Siena Shoulder Bag
▫️Model 846705
▫️Dimensions 22.5*14*8
 The Gucci Siena small shoulder bag continues the evolution of the brand's iconic Horsebit detail. Crafted from fine smooth leather, this bag features a structured silhouette with a 1970s-inspired half-horsebit buckle. Finished with gold-tone hardware and a three-compartment interior with a zip pocket.

items.name_cn:
Gucci Siena Shoulder Bag
▫️ Model 846510 Burgundy
▫️ Dimensions 22.5*14*8
 The Gucci Siena small shoulder bag continues the evolution of the brand's iconic Horsebit element. This shoulder bag is crafted from fine glossy leather with a structured silhouette that incorporates the half-horsebit buckle design details from the 1970s. It features gold-tone hardware and is lined with three compartments and a zip pocket.

items.name_en: High-end GG Marmont Series Black Gunmetal
items.name_cn:
High-end GG Marmont Series Black Gunmetal
GG Marmont Series metal chain mini shoulder bag, soft structured, oversized flap accented with double G hardware. The new colorway features quilted V-shaped leather paired with monochrome hardware. The adjustable chain strap is ingeniously designed, offering versatile ways to wear it, freely switching between shoulder and hand-carry.
Size: 26*15*7cm
Style No.: 443497

specs.rawTitle:
High-end GG Marmont Series Black Gunmetal
GG Marmont Series metal chain mini shoulder bag, soft structured, oversized flap accented with double G hardware. The new colorway features quilted V-shaped leather paired with monochrome hardware. The adjustable chain strap is ingeniously designed, offering versatile ways to wear it, freely switching between shoulder and hand-carry.
Size: 26*15*7cm
Style No.: 443497

items.name_en: Horsebit 1955 New Member Baguette #735178# YY#
items.name_cn:
Horsebit 1955 New Member Baguette #735178# YY#
▪️Dimensions: 24*13*5.5cm▪️
A new member of the 1955 family,
Innovating on the classic ,
The popular baguette shape is more petite and exquisite,
Paired with a super beautiful double-G chain design,
With a leather shoulder strap, the underarm look is full of retro vibes,
Exuding a retro-modern beauty,
Without excessive decoration, it looks even more premium,
This year, it is undoubtedly the bag of the year!

items.name_cn:
Horsebit Shoulder Bag#
▫️Model 860787
▫️Size 31.5*17*12
Presenting the Gucci Half Horsebit collection with a modern twist, reinterpreting one of the brand's most iconic elements. This collection cleverly blends a casual silhouette with the signature half-bit hardware, which gives the series its name.

Light gold-tone hardware

items.name_en: Intro ✨ GG Marmont Chain Mini Bag, includes card holder, can be attached to a larger bag. Features a structured yet soft silhouette with a flap closure and GG metal hardware. Inspired by 70s classic design. Made of quilted leather.

Intro ✨ GG Marmont Chain Mini Bag, includes card holder, can be attached to a larger bag. Features a structured yet soft silhouette with a flap closure and GG metal hardware. Inspired by 70s classic design. Made of quilted leather.

Material ✨ Premium imported cowhide with high-end smooth vintage bronze hardware.
Size ✨ 21x12x5cm
